# =============================================================================
# HCC Drug Discovery — pip requirements
# =============================================================================
# Use this if you prefer a plain venv over conda, or as a fallback.
#
# Recommended usage:
#   python -m venv .venv
#   source .venv/bin/activate        # macOS / Linux
#   .venv\Scripts\activate           # Windows
#   pip install -r env/requirements.txt
#
# PyTorch Geometric requires a separate install step — see bottom of file.
# =============================================================================

# ── Core scientific stack ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
numpy>=1.26,<2.0
pandas>=2.1
scipy>=1.11
matplotlib>=3.8
seaborn>=0.13

# ── Single-cell RNA-seq ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
scanpy>=1.10
anndata>=0.10
leidenalg>=0.10
python-igraph>=0.11
celltypist>=1.6

# ── R interface (annotation notebooks only) ───────────────────────────────────
# Requires R 4.3+ installed on the system.
# Install R: https://cran.r-project.org/
# Then install R packages: Rscript env/r_packages.R
rpy2>=3.5
anndata2ri>=1.3

# ── Network & graph ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
networkx>=3.2

# ── HTTP / API clients ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
requests>=2.31

# ── Machine learning ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
scikit-learn>=1.4

# ── Survival analysis ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
lifelines>=0.28

# ── Jupyter environment ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
jupyterlab>=4.0
notebook>=7.0
ipykernel>=6.29
ipywidgets>=8.1
nbformat>=5.9
nbconvert>=7.0

# ── PyTorch (CPU) ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# For GPU: visit https://pytorch.org/get-started/locally/ and replace this
# with the index URL for your CUDA version.
torch>=2.2
torchvision
torchaudio

# ── PyTorch Geometric ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# IMPORTANT: torch-scatter, torch-sparse, and torch-cluster are NOT on PyPI.
# They must be installed with --find-links pointing to the PyG wheel server.
#
# After everything above is installed, run:
#
#   TORCH=$(python -c "import torch; print(torch.__version__.split('+')[0])")
#
#   # CPU:
#   pip install torch-geometric torch-scatter torch-sparse torch-cluster \
#       --find-links https://data.pyg.org/whl/torch-${TORCH}+cpu.html
#
#   # GPU (CUDA 12.1):
#   pip install torch-geometric torch-scatter torch-sparse torch-cluster \
#       --find-links https://data.pyg.org/whl/torch-${TORCH}+cu121.html
#
# env/setup_env.sh handles this automatically if you use conda.
torch-geometric>=2.5
